# Toolbar Batch B Agent Prompts

## GTK

```text
Base branch for Toolbar Batch B:

- branch: toolbar-batch-b-core

Scope:
- toolbar(_:for:)
- toolbar(removing:)

Read first:
- docs/plans/toolbar-batch-b-plan.md
- docs/plans/toolbar-batch-b-worker-briefs.md

Your job:
- honor hidden toolbar visibility for the relevant GTK toolbar container
- omit removed toolbar placements from rendered items
- add GTK tests for hidden state and placement removal
```
